definitions.text: To attempt to improve one's performance during a period of struggling.
examples: After missing the playoffs for the seventh straight season in a row, the Detroit Red Wings are trying to rebuild.

definitions.text: A process or result of rebuilding.
(said of sports teams) A period during which an attempt is made to improve during a period of struggling.
examples: Since they failed to make it to the playoffs after five consecutive seasons, the team has gone through a lengthy rebuild.
